name: Inventary and equipment
description:
To look in your inventary, type 'i' or 'inventary'. To look
on your weapons, type 'eq'. To equip your body with the equipments
that are in your inventary, type : wear NAME OF EQ. Or wear all
to equip your body with all possible equipments. 
To equip a weapon, use the command wield. You have a short sword
in your inventary, so, type : wield sword or wield short.
Type 'n' to continue.
